title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at HDFC Securities

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at HDFC Securities
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
